summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LaBrand Brand Valuation feature. Backend APIs (GET/PUT /api/brands/{brand_id}/pillars/valuation) are fully functional with 100% success rate (13/13 tests passed). Frontend valuation page loads correctly with all 4 tabs working: Análise Financeira, Role of Brand, Brand Strength (10 factors), and Insights. Calculate button works and updates brand value. Data persistence via autosave and manual save working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (/api/)
Backend: Login with demo@labrand.com / demo123
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/pillars/valuation returns data
Backend: PUT valuation with financial data (receita, lucro, margem, custo capital)
Backend: PUT valuation with Role of Brand Index data
Backend: PUT valuation with Brand Strength scores (10 factors)
Backend: PUT valuation with complete data including brand_value
Backend: Data persistence verified via GET after PUT
Backend: Unauthorized access correctly rejected (401)
Backend: PUT valuation with recommendations array
Backend: Get current user (/api/auth/me)
Backend: Get brands list
Backend: Get specific brand by ID
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Login with demo credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Navigation to 'Avaliação de Marca' works
Frontend: Valuation page loads with data-testid='valuation-page'
Frontend: Tab 1 (Análise Financeira) - all input fields work (receita, lucro, margem, custo capital)
Frontend: Tab 2 (Role of Brand) - RBI slider 0-100% works, justificativa textarea works
Frontend: Tab 3 (Brand Strength) - all 10 factor sliders work, score display shows correctly
Frontend: Tab 4 (Insights) - Calculate button works, shows formula and values
Frontend: Calculate button updates brand value (R$ 9.45M → R$ 17.44M)
Frontend: Save button works with success toast
Frontend: Autosave functionality working
Frontend: P/E Category display (Overperformer Consistente)
Frontend: Brand value summary card displays correctly
seed_data_creation: Valuation data created during testing with financial values, RBI, and brand strength scores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Valuation feature fully tested and working. All 4 tabs functional: Análise Financeira (financial inputs), Role of Brand (RBI slider 0-100%), Brand Strength (10 Interbrand factors with sliders), Insights (calculate button, AI recommendations). Data persists correctly via autosave and manual save. Navigation from sidebar works. Test user demo@labrand.com/demo123 has brand 'Minha Marca Demo' with valuation data.
